Description (Card): As a user, I want to register with username, password, and role so that I can access the system
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Username must be unique; Role must be admin/seller/buyer; Registration should not create a session; System confirms registration

Description (Card): As a registered user, I want to login/logout so that I can securely access the system
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Valid credentials allow login; Invalid credentials show error; Only one active session allowed; Logout clears session; Non-logged users cannot access protected features

Description (Card): As an admin/seller, I want to add, update, and delete cars so that I can manage listings
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only admin/seller allowed; Car ID must be unique; Updates reflect immediately; Unauthorized users denied

Description (Card): As a logged-in user, I want to browse available cars so that I can explore options
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only logged-in users can browse; Only available cars displayed; Data should be accurate

Description (Card): As a user, I want to view car details so that I can make a decision
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Valid car ID shows details; Invalid ID shows error; View count increments on each view; Recently viewed list updated

Description (Card): As a buyer/admin, I want to purchase a car so that I can own it
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only buyer/admin allowed; Car must be available; After purchase car becomes unavailable; Order created with user mapping; Fraud alert triggered if purchase count > 3

Description (Card): As a buyer/admin, I want to manage my wishlist so that I can track preferred cars
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only buyer/admin allowed; Cars can be added/removed; Removing non-existing item handled; Wishlist accessible only after login

Description (Card): As a user, I want to view recently viewed cars so that I can revisit them
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Recent list updated on each view; Shows history per session; Only logged-in users can access

Description (Card): As a user, I want to view my orders so that I can track purchases
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): User can see only their orders; Orders linked to username; Shows order ID, car ID, and status

Description (Card): As an admin, I want to view all orders so that I can monitor transactions
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only admin allowed; Displays all orders; Proper message if no orders exist

Description (Card): As a user, I want to compare two cars so that I can choose better
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Both car IDs must exist; Displays both car details; Error shown if any car not found

Description (Card): As a user, I want to see popular cars so that I can identify trending options
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Cars sorted by view count; Top 5 displayed if available; Only logged-in users can access

Description (Card): As a user, I want to submit feedback so that I can share my experience
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only logged-in users can submit feedback; Feedback stored with username; Confirmation shown after submission

Description (Card): As an admin, I want to view all feedback so that I can analyze user input
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation): Only admin allowed; Displays all feedback; Proper message if no feedback exists
